rationale: No conflict. Elec. Code §274.026 governs comptroller payment for publication costs on secretary of state approval. The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) does not affect this publication-payment process.
quote: the comptroller of public accounts shall issue a warrant payable to the contractor in the amount specified by the secretary.
_note: Rule text concerns state payment for publication; no overlap with proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption increase.
